objective: Transfer a product/stewardship decision card from Moss to Denholm.
context: Moss identified that the next action changes agent role boundaries, which belongs to Denholm rather than technical operations.
decisions_made: Technical implementation is paused until product/stewardship direction is explicit.
open_constraints: Moss may resume only after Denholm creates a bounded technical execution request.
next_action: Denholm decides whether the owner boundary should change and records the decision before any technical implementation.
privacy_constraints: No private product notes or user-sensitive context in the public transfer example.
